nasb.text: “Then we turned and set out for the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea, as the Lord spoke to me, and circled Mount Seir for many days.

esv.text: “Then we turned and journeyed into the wilderness in the direction of the Red Sea, as the Lord told me. And for many days we traveled around Mount Seir.

cnv.text: “以後，我們照著耶和華吩咐我的，回轉過來，沿著往紅海的路起程到曠野去；我們在西珥山繞行了很多日子。

ccb.text: “之后，我们遵照耶和华的吩咐掉转头，沿红海的路前往旷野，在西珥山区绕行了很久。
